definitions.name: los_category
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Short' when los_days is at most 3
  - 'Medium' when los_days is at most 7
  - 'Long' otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN los_days <= 3 THEN 'Short' WHEN los_days <= 7 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Long' END
